name: codefresh
description: Reads Codefresh projects, pipelines, builds, runner agents, shared contexts, container images, registries, triggers, and annotations, and can create/update/delete/run projects, pipelines, contexts, and agents through the Codefresh REST API.

risk.read: external Codefresh API read of projects, pipelines, builds, runner agents, shared contexts, container images, registries, triggers, and annotations
risk.write: external mutation of Codefresh projects, pipelines, contexts, and runner agents, including irreversible deletes and triggering real pipeline runs (consumes build minutes/resources)
risk.approval: required for all write actions; read is unrestricted
